body: This PR deletes some unused code.
title: Delete unused code

body: This PR moves the anelastic thermo state computations into `thermo_state!`, where the dycore computes the grid-mean thermo state. This will make moving other edmf pieces out into the dycore, where they belong.
title: Enable dispatching thermo state on compressibility model

body: This PR adds a job that runs our perf target with `--check-bounds=yes` to make sure that we're not accidentally accessing invalid memory.
title: Add job with check bounds

body:
I've been seeing a bunch of 

```
ERROR: LoadError: HTTP/2 200 (Operation too slow. Less than 1 bytes/sec transferred the last 20 seconds) while requesting https://caltech.box.com/shared/static/of5wi39o643a333yy9vbx5pnf0za503g.nc
--
  | Stacktrace:
  | [1] (::Downloads.var"#9#18"{IOStream, Base.DevNull, Nothing, Vector{Pair{String, String}}, Float64, Nothing, Bool, Nothing, Bool, String, Bool, Bool})(easy::Downloads.Curl.Easy)
  | @ Downloads /central/software/julia/1.8.1/share/julia/stdlib/v1.8/Downloads/src/Downloads.jl:387
```
in our CI recently, and while the two artifacts are pointing to different files, they may be downloaded in parallel and may compete for bandwidth. This PR moves the artifact downloads into an initialization job in the build, so that they happen in serial.
title: Move artifact download to initialization

body:
This PR moves the viscous sponge into the source code.

This removes the closures by adding the operators as arguments into the cache (which are still, at the moment closures in `additional_cache`)
title: Move viscous sponge into src

body:
## Purpose 
Shorten t_end to allow TRMM long runs to finish.
title: Shorten t_end for compressible TRMM longruns

body: This PR should decouple our performance summary from individual benchmark jobs by adding a flag for opting into the perf summary, and this is what we use for filtering out which jobs to collect information for. This should make it easier to merge #991, for example.
title: Improve perf summary filtering, add rosenbrock perf job

body:
This PR:
 - moves advection into src/
 - adds an implicit tendency method with `colidx` to improve indentation
 - Removes closures over global constant operators and parameters
title: Move advection into src, make implicit tendency with colidx
